title: Right Hand Hand
description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 4 damage.
Whenever you play a card that costs 2 Energy or more, return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold] from the [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
upgraded_description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 6 damage.
Whenever you play a card that costs 2 Energy or more, return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold] from the [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
notes: Returns to hand whenever you play a card that costs 2 Energy or more from your Discard Pile. Does not deal damage if Osty is missing.
